profiling.evidence: The runtime is small and deterministic; hosted benchmark and profiling jobs are the next repository-owned performance evidence.
profiling.next_action: Capture benchmark-aware profiling for representative compute budgets before any mature/stable claim.

parity_rationale: The Python implementation is the reference runtime; Rust parity is deferred until benchmark evidence justifies a hot-kernel boundary.
external_gates: Cross-language conformance and Rust parity review
